seo.title: Building AI Email Assistant with Mastra + Vex Guardrails
seo.description: Learn how to build ai email assistant with Mastra + Vex guardrails. Detect failures, prevent drift, and ensure reliability.

content.intro: Building an AI Email Assistant with Mastra enables sophisticated email processing workflows including intent detection, draft generation, and approval flows. However, high-risk operations like PII handling and confidential communications demand robust guardrails to prevent data leaks, inappropriate responses, and compliance violations. Vex integration as middleware ensures reliability by validating outputs, filtering sensitive data, and enforcing verification at every pipeline stage.

architectureOverview.heading: AI Email Assistant Architecture with Mastra
architectureOverview.description:
The Mastra-based AI Email Assistant follows a multi-step workflow: incoming emails trigger intent detection via LLM analysis, followed by draft generation with attachment processing, recipient validation, and human approval before sending. Knowledge bases store user preferences and templates, while memory retrieval provides conversation context. Third-party integrations handle email APIs (Gmail/Outlook) and attachment parsing.

Agent tools extract PII, classify tone, and validate recipients, but common failures include unvalidated step transitions and stale memory injection. Vex middleware intercepts workflow outputs, tool responses, and memory fetches for verification.

The pipeline is orchestrated through Mastra's WorkflowExecutor, with custom nodes for each processing stage, ensuring modular yet interconnected operations.

risks.name: PII Exposure in Drafts
risks.description: Agent generates email drafts containing unfiltered personal data from attachments or memory
risks.mitigation: Vex PII scanner middleware before draft finalization and send approval

risks.name: Inappropriate Tone Detection Failure
risks.description: Tone classifier misses sarcastic/inappropriate language due to LLM hallucination
risks.mitigation: Multi-model tone verification with Vex sentiment analysis ensemble

risks.name: Stale Memory Context Injection
risks.description: Outdated conversation history from knowledge base confuses recipient intent
risks.mitigation: Vex memory freshness validator with timestamp and relevance scoring

risks.name: Malformed Recipient Validation
risks.description: Tool returns invalid email domains or internal addresses for external send
risks.mitigation: Vex schema validation on recipient arrays with domain whitelisting

implementation.title: Mastra Email Intent Detection Workflow
implementation.description: Core workflow node that classifies email intent and routes to appropriate handlers

implementation.title: Draft Generation with Attachments
implementation.description: Processes attachments and generates context-aware email drafts

implementation.title: Recipient Validation Tool
implementation.description: Validates email recipients against company domain and internal policies

implementation.title: Send Approval Workflow
implementation.description: Final human-in-loop approval with audit trail

vexIntegration.title: Vex Middleware for Workflow Validation
vexIntegration.description: Intercepts all workflow step outputs to validate schema and prevent malformed transitions

vexIntegration.title: PII Filtering Before Send
vexIntegration.description: Scans drafts for PII and confidential data before approval workflow

vexIntegration.title: Memory Context Freshness Check
vexIntegration.description: Validates retrieved conversation context isn't stale before processing

cta.heading: Secure Your Mastra AI Email Assistant
cta.description: Integrate Vex guardrails today to protect your email workflows from compliance risks and ensure reliable AI operations.
